title: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
summary: Bitcoin fell to 21-month lows as stock market volatility accompanied three-year highs in US PCE inflation, leading to $600 million in hourly crypto liquidations.

title: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
summary: Galaxy Digital’s stock surge points to a new trend: Investors are rewarding some crypto firms for AI infrastructure, not just digital asset exposure.

title: China Raises €5 Billion in Record Euro Bond Sale
summary: China sold €5 billion ($5.7 billion) of euro-denominated bonds, its biggest ever deal in the currency and the second in seven months.

title: US Consumer Spending Picks Up as Inflation Hits Three-Year High
summary:
US consumer spending accelerated in May even as prices rose at the fastest pace in more than three years, suggesting Americans are powering through the fallout from the Iran war.
Rob Sockin, Chief US Economist at PGIM Credit, reacts to the PCE data and explains how the Fed might react to the numbers

title: Bitcoin Plummets Lower as Strategy's STRC Dives Further From $100 Mark
summary: The price of Bitcoin rapidly fell to nearly $58,000 after Strategy's STRC preferred shares notched a new low and MSTR fell alongside.

title: $47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
summary: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

title: Tether-pegged USDT0 stablecoin crosses $100 billion transaction volume milestone

summary: The decline in search volumes this month coincides with aggregate stablecoin supply having reversed its 10-month expansion.
